metadata.title: Khyaal Engineering Pulse
metadata.vision: Become the leading platform for active aging and community engagement for seniors in India, delivering exceptional experiences through technology, personalized service, and meaningful connections.

epics.name: Platform Modernization Epic
epics.objective: Modernize legacy systems and enhance platform capabilities
epics.scope: Website migration, 50Above50 improvements, CRM integration, API enhancements
epics.keyDeliverables: 29 pages migrated, subscription launch, security hardening
epics.successMetrics: Page speed improvement 40%, revenue growth, security compliance 95%+

epics.name: Analytics & Intelligence Epic
epics.objective: Build comprehensive data foundation and AI capabilities
epics.scope: CDP development, analytics dashboards, AI agents, recommendation engines
epics.keyDeliverables: Gold Tier analytics, sales AI agents, ML recommendations
epics.successMetrics: Data-driven decisions 80%+, AI conversion 15%+, recommendation accuracy 85%+

epics.name: Infrastructure Optimization Epic
epics.objective: Optimize cloud infrastructure and enhance security posture
epics.scope: AWS to GCP migration, cost optimization, monitoring setup
epics.keyDeliverables: Cost reduction 30%, improved monitoring, security compliance
epics.successMetrics: Infrastructure cost savings 30%+, system uptime 99.9%+, security response < 1hr

okrs.objective: Modernize platform infrastructure and achieve security excellence

keyResults.description: Migrate 100% of legacy pages to new platform
Launch $99 subscription tier with payment processing
Complete VAPT and achieve 90%+ security compliance

okrs.objective: Build data-driven decision foundation with AI capabilities

keyResults.description: Launch Data Hub with feature engineering and metrics
Deploy AI Sales Agent for tour-specific outreach

okrs.objective: Reduce infrastructure costs and improve reliability

keyResults.description: Complete AWS to GCP migration for Pulse services

sprints.name: Foundation Sprint
sprints.goal: Establish modern platform foundation and infrastructure optimization

sprints.name: Analytics Foundation Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete platform migration and establish data analytics foundation

sprints.name: Security & AI Sprint
sprints.goal: Launch subscription service and initiate AI agent development

releases.name: v2.1 Platform Foundation
releases.features: 29 legacy pages migrated, 99 subscription launch, basic security
releases.successCriteria: All pages migrated with 30% performance improvement, subscription processing payments
releases.impact: Improved user experience, new revenue stream, security baseline

releases.name: v2.2 Security Hardening
releases.features: VAPT completion, crypto redirect fixes, security monitoring
releases.successCriteria: All critical VAPT issues resolved, security monitoring active

items.text: Legacy page refresh – 29 pages migrated and modernized
items.note: Migrated 29 legacy pages to new platform with modern responsive design, optimized assets, and improved UX patterns.
items.usecase: Improves page speed by 40%, enhances usability, and provides better mobile experience for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: All 29 pages migrated with responsive design
Page load time improved by 40% minimum
SEO scores above 90 for all pages

items.note: Launched premium subscription tier with Razorpay integration, user dashboard, and automated billing cycles.
items.usecase: Supports recurring revenue model and provides premium features to engaged users.
acceptanceCriteria: Razorpay payment gateway integrated and tested

items.note: Created dedicated event landing page with registration form, countdown timer, and event details.
items.usecase: Helps users register easily and access all event information in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with registration form
Countdown timer showing days to event
Integration with CRM for lead capture

items.text: Emailer templates for Travel and Axis Max
items.note: Built reusable, responsive email templates for marketing campaigns with dynamic content blocks.
items.usecase: Speeds up campaign launches and ensures brand consistency across all email communications.
acceptanceCriteria: Two templates created (Travel and Axis Max)

items.note: Improved chatbot interface with better visual design, loading states, and error handling.
items.usecase: Makes customer support interaction smoother and more intuitive for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: UI redesign with larger touch targets

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, page views, and conversion events across the website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics for data-driven decision making and user journey optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all website pages
Key events tracking verified (pageview, signup, purchase)

items.note: Conducted root cause analysis for incorrect website redirect to crypto domain. Issue identified in DNS configuration and server routing rules.
items.usecase: Prevents users from being redirected to wrong domains, ensuring brand trust and security.

items.note: Kicked off comprehensive Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) with Appknox security platform for entire web application.
items.usecase: Identifies and mitigates security vulnerabilities early to ensure platform safety and regulatory compliance.

items.note: Implementing Google reCAPTCHA v3 on all user-facing forms to prevent bot submissions and spam.
items.usecase: Reduces spam form submissions by 95%+ and protects platform from automated attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: reCAPTCHA v3 integrated on all forms
Fallback to v2 for low scores
Form submission analytics tracking spam reduction

items.note: Creating dedicated event landing page for Rajkot event with localized content, registration form, and venue information.
items.usecase: Helps users in Rajkot region register easily and access event-specific information.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with Gujarati language support option
Registration form with Rajkot venue details
Google Maps integration for venue location

items.note: Adding missing analytics event tracking for key user actions not currently captured in Pulse.
items.usecase: Improves data completeness for journey analysis and enables better conversion funnel tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Gap analysis completed for missing events
Event data validated in Pulse dashboard

items.note: Automating Slack/email notifications during page migration process with progress tracking and issue alerts.
items.usecase: Keeps team informed of migration progress in real-time with less manual status updates.

items.note: Creating reusable content blocks in CMS (hero sections, testimonials, CTAs) for faster page building.
items.usecase: Speeds up website content creation by 60% and ensures consistent design patterns.

items.note: Implementing fixes for critical and high-severity security vulnerabilities identified in VAPT report.
items.usecase: Strengthens website security posture and achieves 95%+ compliance with security standards.

items.note: Implementing stronger server-side validation and redirect protection based on RCA findings.
items.usecase: Prevents malicious redirects and ensures users always reach correct Khyaal domains.
acceptanceCriteria: Server-side checks for all redirect URLs

items.note: Planning and designing reusable event page templates with configurable sections for faster event launches.
items.usecase: Reduces event page creation time from 2 days to 2 hours with consistent branding.
acceptanceCriteria: CMS integration for easy template selection

items.text: Events listing and joining via Web Zoom SDK
items.note: Allow users to join Zoom events directly from the website without OTP login. Authentication via secure app-generated code or QR code scan with JWT token generation.
items.usecase: Enables seamless event joining from website, reducing friction and improving attendance rates by 30%.
acceptanceCriteria: Zoom Web SDK integrated on event pages
JWT token generation and validation secure

items.note: Complete redesign of 50Above50 homepage with modern UI, improved visual hierarchy, and senior-friendly accessibility features.
items.usecase: Creates stronger first impression and improves user engagement by 25%, resulting in higher event registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: New design implemented with larger fonts and touch targets
Hero section highlights upcoming events prominently
Mobile-responsive design tested on common devices

items.note: Simplified category information pages with clearer descriptions, visual enhancements, and improved navigation for 50 categories.
items.usecase: Helps users understand 50Above50 program categories 40% faster, leading to better category selection and participation.
acceptanceCriteria: All 50 category pages updated with new design
Category descriptions simplified for senior audience
Visual icons added for quick category identification

items.note: Enabled self-service certificate download portal for participants who completed 50Above50 categories, with secure authentication.
items.usecase: Reduces support requests by 60% and provides instant certificate access to returning participants.
acceptanceCriteria: Download portal accessible from user dashboard
Certificates generated with user name and category
PDF format optimized for printing and sharing

items.note: Created bundled offer combining 50Above50 2026 registration with app membership at discounted price point.
items.usecase: Encourages membership sign-ups with 30% bundle discount, driving recurring revenue and user retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle offer page created with clear pricing
Bundle automatically applies both registration and membership

items.note: Implemented coin-based redemption system allowing users to unlock 50Above50 categories using earned reward coins.
items.usecase: Increases platform engagement by 40% and provides gamification incentive for continued participation.
acceptanceCriteria: Coin redemption flow working on category pages
Coin balance updated in real-time after redemption
Category access granted immediately after redemption
Redemption history tracked in user profile

items.note: Refined category structure by merging overlapping categories, updating descriptions, and adding new categories while maintaining exactly 50 total. Migrated all existing user data to align with new structure.
items.usecase: Ensures consistent, optimized category framework for better content organization, user navigation, and program clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: All user data migrated without loss
New structure tested with sample users

items.note: Connected 50Above50 website lead forms to Zoho CRM for automated lead capture and nurturing workflows.
items.usecase: Improves lead tracking efficiency by 70% and enables automated follow-up campaigns for registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: All lead forms connected to Zoho API
Lead data synced in real-time to CRM

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, category views, registrations, and engagement patterns across 50Above50 website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics showing how users interact with categories, enabling data-driven program optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all pages
Key events tracked (category view, registration, certificate download)
Data flowing to Pulse analytics dashboard

items.note: Initiated comprehensive security review for 50Above50 website including vulnerability scanning and security best practices assessment.
items.usecase: Identifies potential security issues early, ensuring participant data protection and platform trustworthiness.

items.note: Adding missing activity tracking events for 50Above50 user actions not currently captured (coin usage, certificate downloads, category completions).
items.usecase: Improves campaign targeting accuracy and enables better conversion funnel analysis for the 50Above50 program.
acceptanceCriteria: Gap analysis identifying all missing events completed
All critical events implemented and tested
Event data validated in Pulse dashboard

items.note: Implementing security fixes for vulnerabilities identified in 50Above50 VAPT report, prioritizing critical and high-severity issues.
items.usecase: Strengthens 50Above50 website security posture and protects participant data from potential breaches.

items.note: Planning seamless transition from website to mobile app for 50Above50 participants, including deep linking and context preservation.
items.usecase: Provides smoother cross-platform experience, reducing friction and improving app adoption by 35%.
acceptanceCriteria: Deep linking implemented for all category pages
A/B testing shows improved app adoption

items.note: Built comprehensive backend system for coin-based rewards with transaction tracking, balance management, and redemption history.
items.usecase: Enables users to redeem 50Above50 categories using earned coins, driving engagement and platform stickiness.

items.note: Developed bidirectional connector between 50Above50 CRM and Zoho CRM for automated data synchronization of leads, contacts, and activities.
items.usecase: Keeps lead records updated in real-time, enabling marketing automation and reducing manual data entry by 80%.
acceptanceCriteria: Bidirectional sync working for leads and contacts
Sync conflicts handled with priority rules

items.note: Enhancing speed and reliability of CRM data synchronization during migration with optimized batch processing and error handling.
items.usecase: Ensures CRM data is accurate, up-to-date, and reliable for reporting and decision-making with 99%+ data integrity.
acceptanceCriteria: Error handling with automatic retry logic

items.note: Enhanced admin controls for Tambola game management including board generation, winner verification, and prize management features.
items.usecase: Makes Tambola event management 50% faster and reduces manual errors during game execution.

items.note: Simplified event creation and editing workflow with improved form validation, auto-save functionality, and streamlined UI.
items.usecase: Speeds up event setup by 60%, reducing admin time from 15 minutes to 6 minutes per event.
acceptanceCriteria: Form validation with clear error messages
Bulk edit capability for recurring events
Event templates for common event types

items.note: Organized events into hierarchical categories and sub-categories with filtering and search capabilities for better admin organization.
items.usecase: Improves event discoverability by 70% and makes event management more scalable as event inventory grows.
acceptanceCriteria: Filtering by category working in admin panel
Category assignment required for new events

items.note: Maintained backward compatibility for legacy admin workflows and data structures while migrating to new system architecture.
items.usecase: Avoids disruption for existing admin users and ensures zero downtime during system transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: All legacy admin functions still working
Deprecation warnings added for future removal

items.note: Delivered multiple admin panel improvements requested by product team including reporting enhancements, user management features, and workflow optimizations.
items.usecase: Supports product team needs and enables better business operations with enhanced admin capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: All requested features implemented and tested
Training materials provided to admin users

items.note: Updated the backend for Tambola features.
items.usecase: Supports the latest product flow.

items.note: Improved backend handling for events.
items.usecase: Makes event setup cleaner.

items.note: Kept older integrations working.
items.usecase: Prevents breaks during updates.

items.note: Updated the identity verification flow.
items.usecase: Keeps the process compliant.

items.note: Improved loading of event lists.
items.usecase: Makes the app faster for users.

items.note: Enabled subscription-related backend flows.
items.usecase: Supports purchase and management.

items.note: Added rules for event access.
items.usecase: Controls who can join specific events.

items.note: Built the API for coin redemption.
items.usecase: Allows reward usage in the system.

items.note: Connected backend data with Zoho.
items.usecase: Keeps CRM records in sync.

items.note: Started API security testing.
items.usecase: Identifies technical risks early.

items.text: Membership status sync via Razorpay to Pulse
items.note: Capturing all membership status updates (e.g., initiated, charged, started, cancelled, expired) and sending them to Pulse via Razorpay webhook triggers.
items.usecase: Provides complete visibility of the user membership lifecycle for better tracking, automation, and engagement.

items.note: Connecting tools for automated updates.
items.usecase: Reduces manual coordination.

items.note: Supporting ongoing community requests.
items.usecase: Keeps user help requests moving.

items.note: Handling one-off data needs.
items.usecase: Supports business operations quickly.

items.note: Fixing security findings in the API.
items.usecase: Improves platform safety.

items.note: Planned support for a future product area.
items.usecase: Prepares for future expansion.

items.note: Improving how work is processed in the backend.
items.usecase: Makes the system more scalable.

items.note: Planning the backend for chat features.
items.usecase: Enables future messaging support.

items.text: Support for app-code authentication in API
items.note: Allow users to authenticate via a temporary app-generated code or QR code instead of OTP or password. This will enable seamless login and joining of events via the Web Zoom SDK.
items.usecase:
1. User generates a temporary app code from the mobile app.
2. User submits the app code to the API endpoint.
3. API validates the code and issues a short-lived JWT token.

items.note: Track consecutive user activity (like attending events, completing tasks, or participating in sessions) to encourage engagement and reward consistency.
items.usecase:
1. Track daily/weekly participation of users in events or platform activities.
2. Increment streak count when user performs the required action consecutively.
3. Show streaks on user dashboard to motivate engagement.
4. Optionally, provide rewards or badges for achieving streak milestones.
5. Reset streak if the user misses a day/session.

items.note: Connecting reporting tools and workflows.
items.usecase: Reduces manual updates.

items.note: Sending tour-related emails manually to selected user groups (cohorts).
items.usecase: Enables targeted communication for specific user segments.

items.note: Helping with community-related requests.
items.usecase: Keeps support flowing.

items.usecase: Supports operational work.

items.usecase: Improves stability and reduces complexity.

items.note: Lowered overall cloud costs.
items.usecase: Reduces infrastructure spend.

items.note: Improved login/session handling.
items.usecase: Makes console access smoother.

items.usecase: Improves reporting speed.

items.usecase: Improves data quality in reports.

items.note: Showed time in local Indian format.
items.usecase: Makes reports easier to read.

items.note: Improved cohort filtering.
items.usecase: Makes targeting more accurate.

items.note: Allowed outside lists to be used.
items.usecase: Brings more data into segmentation.

items.usecase: Saves time when creating new audiences.

items.usecase: Makes targeting more flexible.

items.note: Updated cohorts on a schedule.
items.usecase: Keeps audience lists current.

items.note: Allowed journeys to use outside data.
items.usecase: Expands campaign reach.

items.note: Enabled journey duplication.
items.usecase: Speeds up journey setup.

items.text: Utility support for DOB, current time, and event time
items.note: Added date and time based rules.
items.usecase: Improves journey logic.

items.note: Improved journey speed and stability.
items.usecase: Handles more traffic reliably.

items.note: Added rule-based journey starts.
items.usecase: Targets users more precisely.

items.note: Improved filtering inside journeys.
items.usecase: Makes journeys more accurate.

items.note: Added automatic action outputs.
items.usecase: Reduces manual follow-up work.

items.note: Enabled tag-based audience control.
items.usecase: Improves targeting and personalization.

items.note: Enable dynamic logic creation within user journeys using custom expressions for advanced personalization and decision-making.
items.usecase: Allow defining dynamic conditions to control journey flow, enabling personalized actions and branching based on user data.

items.note: Kept device tokens updated.
items.usecase: Ensures notifications reach the right device.

items.note: Created campaign groups automatically.
items.usecase: Speeds up messaging to new audiences.

items.note: Allowed campaigns to send later.
items.usecase: Improves campaign timing.

items.note: Added a history view for campaigns.
items.usecase: Makes tracking easier.

items.note: Built an AI assistant to handle initial sales calls.
items.usecase: Helps reach out to users faster and reduces manual calling effort.

items.text: AI Sales Agent – Call summarization setup
items.note: Call summaries are working via Exotel; evaluating support on Plivo where recording is limited.
items.usecase: Provides quick insights from calls without manual review.

items.note: AI calling agent is configured with tour-specific data (tours + FAQs) to handle targeted conversations.
items.usecase: Enables personalized outreach for specific tours to improve engagement and conversions.

items.text: Sales Agent – Specific Tours Pilot launch tesing, stakeholder alignment
items.note: Preparing for internal pilot testing by aligning stakeholders and refining prompts, responses, and data based on initial feedback.
items.usecase: Ensures the system is validated internally before full rollout.

items.note: Finalizing conversation scripts including sales pitch, closure, and intent/ratings handling.
items.usecase: Improves quality of conversations and increases chances of successful conversions.

items.text: Plivo setup for India & recording feasibility
items.note: Setting up Plivo for Indian numbers and checking recording support and associated costs. Manual recording remains a fallback option.
items.usecase: Enables scalable calling infrastructure for India with clarity on recording capabilities.

items.note: Exploring call recording setup with Plivo, including feasibility and cost. Manual recording is possible but requires additional effort.
items.usecase: Helps review calls, improve quality, and maintain records for training and compliance.

items.note: Upgrading the AI assistant with improved intelligence, context handling, and response quality.
items.usecase: Provides smarter, more contextual assistance to enhance user engagement and support.

items.note: Brought key data sources into Pulse.
items.usecase: Creates a unified view of customers.

items.note: Established a centralized data foundation.
items.usecase: Features: Data Models, Metrics. Enables cohort/segment creation (e.g., non-club users), powers recommendations and personalization, and supports dashboards and analytics.

items.note: Preparing important data features.
items.usecase: Supports better analytics and predictions.

items.note: Defining the structure for Gold Tier data.
items.usecase: Keeps data organized for use.

items.note: Defining key measures for Gold Tier.
items.usecase: Helps track performance clearly.

items.note: Publishing user-facing dashboards with key metrics and insights.
items.usecase: Makes data-driven insights easily accessible for teams to monitor performance and make informed decisions.

items.note: Building and finalizing ~50 ML features including propensity, time-series, standard deviation, and averages.
items.usecase: Improves model accuracy and strength of recommendations.

items.note: Integrating long-term and contextual memory using Mem0 and Neo4j.
items.usecase: Enables deeper personalization based on user memory and behavior.

items.note: Building recommendation models using historical (cold) data.
items.usecase: Predicts user needs and preferences proactively.

items.note: Developing real-time recommendations based on live (hot) data.
items.usecase: Delivers real-time, context-aware recommendations to improve engagement.

subtracks.name: Pages – Headless CMS
subtracks.note: A centralized content system enabling teams to create once and reuse content across the platform without engineering dependency.

items.note: Deployed the headless CMS for content creation and management.
items.usecase: Enables teams to manage and publish content independently from a single source.

items.note: Introducing personalization within flows using user data and behavior.
items.usecase: Enables dynamic, user-specific journeys to improve engagement and outcomes.

items.note: Reducing cloud costs across environments.
items.usecase: Improves cost efficiency.

items.note: Preparing security test documentation.
items.usecase: Supports security review and compliance.

items.usecase: Helps resolve incorrect redirection and ensures users reach the correct website.

items.note: Moved storage to Google Cloud.
items.usecase: Improves platform alignment and efficiency.

items.note: Added system monitoring dashboards.
items.usecase: Improves visibility into system health.

items.note: Set up instant alerts for issues.
items.usecase: Speeds up incident response.

items.note: Monitoring is now active across apps.
